AttachTemplateOptions.description: Controls how templates are discovered and attached to documents

SearchForTemplateName.description: Template filename to search for when attaching (e.g., 'Normal.dotm')

IncludeFilter.description: Regex pattern to include templates (e.g., '^.*\.dot[mx]$' for .dotx/.dotm)

ExcludeFilter.description: Regex pattern to exclude templates from matching

TemplatePropertyName.description: Custom property name storing the template reference

AutoAttachDefaultTemplateOnOpen.description: Automatically attaches the default template when documents open

ConfigurationLocationOptions.description: Paths where configuration files are loaded from

Shared.description: Shared configuration path for all users (supports environment variables)

ContentControlOptions.description: Settings for finding and creating content controls in documents

FindOptions.description: Named patterns for locating existing content controls in documents

AddOptions.description: Named definitions for creating new content controls

Enabled.description: Enables verbose logging and developer diagnostics

DocumentManagementOptions.description: Integration settings for document management systems

Provider.description: Document management system to integrate with (None, iManage, NetDocuments, etc.)

PreProfileTemplates.description: Templates requiring profile data before document creation

DocType.description: DMS document type requiring pre-profile data entry

Filter.description: Regex pattern to match templates that require pre-profiling

CloseOnCancel.description: Closes the document without saving if user cancels the profile dialog

Properties.description: DMS property definitions that can be queried and displayed

WithAdditionalData.description: Includes related data like lookup descriptions with the property value

PropertyMappings.description: Maps DMS properties to Word document properties

CustomProperties.description: Maps DMS properties to Word custom document properties

DocumentVariables.description: Maps DMS properties to Word document variables

DocumentProperties.description: Maps DMS properties to built-in Word document properties (Author, Title, etc.)

ExternalDataProviders.description: Named data sources (JSON files, Outlook, APIs) that supply values to documents

OutlookAddressbook.description: Name of the Outlook address book to query

ConnectionSettings.description: Connection string for the Outlook data source

SQLQuery.description: DASL query to filter Outlook contacts

Timeout.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for Outlook data (default: 15000)

ConnectionType.description: Data source type (JSON, Outlook, OutlookAddressBookForm, XLSX)

FieldAliasOrder.description: Maps internal field names to user-friendly display names

RemoveEmptyRows.description: Filters out rows where all selected fields are empty

Filename.description: Path to the JSON or Excel file (supports environment variables)

Timeout.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for file load (default: 15000)

SheetList.description: Excel sheet names to show or hide (leave empty to show all)

ShowHideSheetList.description: Whether SheetList defines sheets to 'Show' or 'Hide' (default: 'Show')

ConnectionType.description: Data source type (JSON, Outlook, OutlookAddressBookForm, XLSX)

FieldAliasOrder.description: Maps internal field names to user-friendly display names

RemoveEmptyRows.description: Filters out rows where all selected fields are empty

AddressbookName.description: Outlook address book name to open in the selection form

ContactFieldAliasOrder.description: Field aliases for local Outlook contacts

ConnectionType.description: Data source type (JSON, Outlook, OutlookAddressBookForm, XLSX)

FieldAliasOrder.description: Maps internal field names to user-friendly display names

RemoveEmptyRows.description: Filters out rows where all selected fields are empty

ConnectionSettings.description: Connection string for the Excel OLE DB data source

Query.description: SQL query to select data from the Excel workbook (e.g., Select * from [Sheet$])

Timeout.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for Excel data (default: 15000)

ConnectionType.description: Data source type (JSON, Outlook, OutlookAddressBookForm, XLSX)

FieldAliasOrder.description: Maps internal field names to user-friendly display names

RemoveEmptyRows.description: Filters out rows where all selected fields are empty

FileProviderOptions.description: Configures file providers for document menus (New Document, Starter Document, Insert Snippet)

NewDocument.description: Template providers for the New Document menu

MaxDepth.description: Maximum subdirectory depth to search (0 = root only, default = 0)

Prefixes.description: Only show templates with these prefixes

ExcludedContainers.description: Container names to exclude from discovery

Title.description: Human-readable note explaining what this provider does

AfterDays.description: Number of days after which this threshold applies

Icon.description: Icon to display when threshold is exceeded. Prefix with 'mso' when using mso Images

StarterDocument.description: Template providers for the Starter Document menu

InsertSnippet.description: Template providers for the Insert Snippet menu

LicenceOptions.description: Licence activation details for the add-in

ActivationToken.description: Activation token provided during licence registration

AddressbookName.description: Outlook address book name to search for contacts (default: 'Contacts')

Dialogs.description: Named dialog definitions for prompting users to enter or select data

QueryDialogName.description: Unique identifier for this dialog definition

DialogCaption.description: Title text shown in the dialog window (default: 'Query Tool')

HideColumns.description: Column names or indexes to hide from the results grid

AllowDuplicates.description: Allows selecting the same record multiple times

ButtonTag.description: Text label for the ribbon button that opens this dialog (default: 'Select')

ColumnOrder.description: Column indexes defining the display order in the results grid

DropDownColumns.description: Columns to render as dropdown filters with values from the data

SearchType.description: Search mode: 'Standard' for field-specific search, 'Fuzzy' for all-fields search

SearchBoxCount.description: Number of search boxes shown in Standard search mode (default: 1)

ShowAutotextPanel.description: Shows the AutoText selection panel in the dialog

ShowSearchPanel.description: Shows the search/filter panel in the dialog

ImageRoot.description: Base path for images referenced in the dialog

SingleSelectionOnly.description: Limits selection to one record and hides the multi-select grid

SearchText.description: Pre-populates the search box with this text when dialog opens

SearchBoxFields.description: Maps search box identifiers to field names they filter on

DialogWidth.description: Dialog window width in pixels at 96 DPI (default: 800)

DialogHeight.description: Dialog window height in pixels at 96 DPI (default: 600)

AutoColumnWidthThreshold.description: Maximum auto-sized column width in pixels before capping (default: 600)

AutoColumnWidthDefault.description: Width applied to columns exceeding AutoColumnWidthThreshold (default: 400)

AlwaysShowDialog.description: Shows dialog even when SearchText returns exactly one result

ShowPleaseWait.description: Shows 'Please Wait...' message during slow data loads (AD, Azure AD)

QueryPanel.description: Custom query panel definitions for advanced filtering

RibbonIconsOptions.description: Custom icons for ribbon buttons loaded from external files

Icons.description: Custom icon definitions rendered from text characters using fonts

Name.description: Unique identifier for referencing this icon in ribbon XML

Text.description: Characters to render as the icon (e.g., emoji, symbol, or letter)

Size.description: Icon dimensions in pixels (creates Size x Size bitmap)

FontName.description: Font family name for rendering the text (e.g., 'Segoe UI Symbol')

FontSize.description: Font size in pixels for the rendered text

FontColour.description: Text colour as hex RGB ('#FF0000') or named colour (default: 'Black')

XOffset.description: Horizontal offset in pixels for positioning the text

YOffset.description: Vertical offset in pixels for positioning the text

RulesOptions.description: Business rules engine workflows for conditional logic

Workflows.description: Microsoft RulesEngine workflows defining conditional business logic

RibbonItemRules.description: Maps ribbon item id/tag patterns to visibility and enabled workflows

EnabledWhen.description: Rules workflow determining when this item is enabled (default: 'Always')

VisibleWhen.description: Rules workflow determining when this item is visible (default: 'Always')

ScriptOptions.description: Defines reusable scripts and their ribbon/shortcut mappings

Scripts.description: Named script definitions containing sequences of commands

Comment.description: Human-readable note explaining what this script does

Commands.description: Ordered list of commands executed when this script runs

Range.description: The range to apply the command

AllCaps.description: Formats text in ALL CAPITALS (True, False, Toggle)

Colour.description: Font colour as hex RGB (e.g., '#FF0000' for red) or named colour

ColourIndex.description: Font colour as Word colour index (1-16, where 1=Black, 2=Blue, etc.)

DoubleStrikeThrough.description: Applies double strikethrough formatting (True, False, Toggle)

Hidden.description: Marks text as hidden (True, False, Toggle)

Position.description: Vertical position offset in points (positive=raised, negative=lowered)

SmallCaps.description: Formats text in Small Caps (True, False, Toggle)

Underline.description: Underline style (None, Single, Double, Dotted, Wavy, etc.)

CharacterCase.description: Changes text case (LowerCase, UpperCase, TitleWord, TitleSentence, ToggleCase, etc.)

Range.description: The range to apply the command

BaseLineAlignment.description: Vertical alignment of text on a line (Top, Centre, Baseline, FarEast50)

CharacterUnitFirstLineIndent.description: First line indent in character units (for East Asian typography)

CharacterUnitLeftIndent.description: Left indent in character units (for East Asian typography)

CharacterUnitRightIndent.description: Right indent in character units (for East Asian typography)

FirstLineIndent.description: First line indent in points (positive=indent, negative=hanging indent)

KeepTogether.description: Keeps all lines of paragraph on same page (True, False, Undefined)

KeepWithNext.description: Keeps paragraph with following paragraph on same page (True, False, Undefined)

LineSpacing.description: Line spacing value; interpretation depends on LineSpacingRule

LineSpacingRule.description: How LineSpacing is interpreted (Single, AtLeast, Exactly, Multiple, etc.)

LineUnitAfter.description: Space after paragraph in line units (for East Asian typography)

LineUnitBefore.description: Space before paragraph in line units (for East Asian typography)

MirrorIndents.description: Swaps left/right indents on facing pages (True, False, Undefined)

NoLineNumber.description: Suppresses line numbers for this paragraph (True, False, Undefined)

OutlineLevel.description: Outline level for navigation and TOC (Level1-Level9, BodyText)

PageBreakBefore.description: Forces page break before this paragraph (True, False, Undefined)

WidowControl.description: Prevents single lines at top/bottom of pages (True, False, Undefined)

Range.description: The range to apply the command

StyleName.description: Name of the Word style to apply (e.g., 'Heading 1', 'Normal', custom style name)

Range.description: The range to apply the command
The range to apply the command
The range to apply the command

Characters.description: Characters to remove from the selection (e.g., ['\t', '\n'] removes tabs and newlines)

Name.description: Name of the document custom property to delete

Range.description: The range to apply the command

Words.description: Words with exact casing to enforce (e.g., ['iPhone', 'macOS', 'McDonald's'])

IgnoreFirstWord.description: Skips the first word of each sentence when enforcing case

Range.description: The range to apply the command

FieldText.description: Word field code to insert (e.g., 'DATE \\@ "MMMM d, yyyy"', 'DOCPROPERTY Title')

Range.description: The range to apply the command

Text.description: Text to insert at the current selection

PreventDuplicates.description: Skips insertion if identical text already exists at the selection

AfterInsertion.description: Controls cursor placement after text is inserted

MacroName.description: Name of macro to run (can include template.module.macro)

Parameters.description: Optional parameters to pass to the macro (max 30, supports string/number/boolean/null)

Name.description: Name of the document custom property to set

Value.description: Value to assign to the custom property

Options.description: Options for field code updates, including per-template settings

Template.description: Per-template or glob-pattern options keyed by template selector (e.g., Legal.dotx, *.dotx, *.*)

StoryGroups.description: Story groups to update (e.g., Body, Headers, Footers, TOCs). If omitted, updates all

Mappings.description: Maps ribbon button IDs to script definitions with visibility and enabled rules

Script.description: Name of the script to execute when this mapping triggers

EnabledWhen.description: Rules workflow determining when this button is enabled (default: 'Always')

VisibleWhen.description: Rules workflow determining when this button is visible (default: 'Always')

OnEvents.description: List of application events that should automatically trigger this script

Delimiter.description: Delimiter characters used to identify pairs (e.g., '[' and ']').

Blob.description: Text or glyph to insert. For Wingdings, set to the character that maps to the desired symbol (e.g., 'l' for a filled circle).

Font.description: Font to apply when inserting the blob (e.g., 'Wingdings').

AllCaps.description: Formats text in ALL CAPITALS (True, False, Toggle)

Colour.description: Font colour as hex RGB (e.g., '#FF0000' for red) or named colour

ColourIndex.description: Font colour as Word colour index (1-16, where 1=Black, 2=Blue, etc.)

DoubleStrikeThrough.description: Applies double strikethrough formatting (True, False, Toggle)

Hidden.description: Marks text as hidden (True, False, Toggle)

Position.description: Vertical position offset in points (positive=raised, negative=lowered)

SmallCaps.description: Formats text in Small Caps (True, False, Toggle)

Underline.description: Underline style (None, Single, Double, Dotted, Wavy, etc.)

CharacterCase.description: Changes text case (LowerCase, UpperCase, TitleWord, TitleSentence, ToggleCase, etc.)
